sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome'; import { faArrowRight } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'; import { products, journalImage, serumImage, moisturizerImage } from '../data/products'; import { useWishlist } from '../context/WishlistContext'; import './HomePage.css'; import heroImage from "../pages/screen.png"; function useReveal() { useEffect(() => { const observer = new IntersectionObserver( entries => entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('reveal-active'); }), { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -60px 0px' } ); document.querySelectorAll('.reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el)); return () => observer.disconnect(); }, []); } export default function HomePage() { useReveal(); const { addToWishlist } = useWishlist(); const recommended = products.slice(0, 4); return (
{/* Hero */}

Purely Herbal.
Simply Radiant.

Experience the gentle power of earth's finest ingredients. Simple, handcrafted herbal skin and hair care for your natural glow.

SHOP COLLECTION
{/* Recommended */}
Personalized Picks

Recommended for You

{recommended.map((p, i) => (

{p.name}

{p.subtitle}

₹{p.price.toLocaleString()} VIEW
))}
{/* Bestsellers Zig-Zag */}
The Essentials

Bestselling Herbal Blends

VIEW SHOP
{/* Row 1 */}
Nourishing Blends

Herbal Oils

Pure herbal oils crafted to nourish, strengthen, and restore. From hair care to skin care, our cold-pressed oils bring the goodness of nature directly to you.

EXPLORE COLLECTION
{/* Row 2 */}
Daily Care

Herbal Soaps & Balms

Gentle soaps and soothing balms made with natural herbs. Perfect for everyday use, they cleanse and care without harsh chemicals.

VIEW ALL
{/* Journal */}

The Journal

Herbal Spotlight

The Ancient Wisdom of Rosehip & Amla

Rich in natural vitamins, our cold-pressed rosehip and amla oils are sourced directly from trusted farms. Discover how these ancient remedies help strengthen hair, brighten skin, and restore your natural glow the simple way...

); }
